debug_info.goal:
case h
f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ
F : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
ℓ : ℕ → ℝ
hfint : ∀ (n : ℕ), HasIntegral (f n) a b (ℓ n)
hfF : UnifConv f F
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
N n : ℕ
hn : n ≥ N
M : ℕ
hN : ∀ (x : ℝ), |f n x - F x| < ε / (b - a)
⊢ |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε

            apply abs_mul

simpa using hN
    have h5 : |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| ≤ ∑ i in Finset.range M, |f n (x i) - F (x i)| * |X i| := by
      have h7 : RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M = ∑ i in Finset.range M, (f n (x i) - F (x i)) * (X i) := by
        simp [RiemannSum]
        <;> ring_nf <;> simp [mul_sub]
        <;> ring
      have h8 : |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| = |∑ i in Finset.range M, (f n (x i) - F (x i)) * (X i)| := by
        rw [h7]
      have h9 : |∑ i in Finset.range M, (f n (x i) - F (x i)) * (X i)| ≤ ∑ i in Finset.range M, |(f n (x i) - F (x i)) * (X i)| := by
        apply Finset.abs_sum_le_sum_abs
      have h10 : ∑ i in Finset.range M, |(f n (x i) - F (x i)) * (X i)| = ∑ i in Finset.range M, |f n (x i) - F (x i)| * |X i| := by
        congr
        funext i
        simp [abs_mul]
      have h11 : |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| ≤ ∑ i in Finset.range M, |f n (x i) - F (x i)| * |X i| := by
        rw [h8, h9, h10]
      linarith
    have h12 : ∑ i in Finset.range M, |f n (x i) - F (x i)| * |X i| < ε := by
      have h13 : ∀ i : ℕ, i ∈ Finset.range M → |f n (x i) - F (x i)| < ε / (b - a) := by

        have h14 : |f n (x i) - F (x i)| < ε / (b - a) := h4 (x i)
        simpa using h14
      have h14 : ∀ i : ℕ, i ∈ Finset.range M → |f n (x i) - F (x i)| * |X i| ≤ (ε / (b - a)) * |X i| := by
        intro i hi
        have h15 : |f n (x i) - F (x i)| < ε / (b - a) := h13 i hi
        have h16 : |X i| ≥ 0 := by apply abs_nonneg
        nlinarith
      have h17 : ∑ i in Finset.range M, |f n (x i) - F (x i)| * |X i| ≤ ∑ i in Finset.range M, (ε / (b - a)) * |X i| := by
        apply Finset.sum_le_sum
        intro i hi
        specialize h14 i hi
        linarith
      have h18 : ∑ i in Finset.range M, (ε / (b - a)) * |X i| = (ε / (b - a)) * (∑ i in Finset.range M, |X i|) := by
        rw [Finset.mul_sum]
      have h19 : ∑ i in Finset.range M, |X i| = b - a := by
        have h20 : ∑ i in Finset.range M, |X i| = ∑ i in Finset.range M, (X i) := by
          congr
          funext i
          have h22 : X i ≥ 0 := by
            have h23 : x i ≤ x (i + 1) := by
              have h24 : ∀ (i : ℕ), i < M → x i ≤ x (i + 1) := by
                apply monotone_of_deriv_nonneg
                all_goals
                  try { linarith }
                  try { tauto }
              specialize h24 i (by linarith)
              linarith
            rw [abs_of_nonneg h22]
            all_goals linarith
          simp [h22]
        rw [h20]
        have h24 : ∑ i in Finset.range M, (X i) = b - a := by
          simp [Finset.sum_range_succ]
          <;> ring_nf <;> simp [show x M = b by linarith, show x 0 = a by linarith]
          all_goals linarith
        linarith
      rw [h18, h19]
      field_simp [show b - a ≠ 0 by linarith]

    linarith [h5, h12]
  have h2 : ∃ (L : ℝ), SeqLim ℓ L ∧ HasIntegral F a b L := by
    have h3 : ∃ (L : ℝ), ∃ (h : HasIntegral F a b L), ∃ (hl : SeqLim ℓ L) := by

    rcases h3 with ⟨L, hF, hL⟩

apply Real.hasIntegral_of_unif_conv
